nativeImeAutomationLimitations: System-level macOS native IME composition UI cannot be fully automated in this Bun/xterm seam harness.

1.notes: Overlay render matched deterministic cursor seam anchor transform + minHeight.

2.notes: Composing Enter was swallowed; post-composition Enter remained forwardable as submit/newline.

3.notes: Unicode11 cell-width seam returned expected double-width for Hangul characters.

4.notes: Referenced existing NFC regression test in src/main/workspace-persistence.test.ts.

5.notes: Composition buffer retained the full update stream and suppressed duplicate PTY echo once.

6.notes: Deterministic seam harness measured input→PTY echo→paint path. Native macOS IME measurement remains manual QA.

7.notes: Default terminal font-family keeps D2Coding first and Noto Sans KR as immediate fallback.

metrics.font_stack: "D2Coding", "Noto Sans KR", ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Liberation Mono", "Courier New", monospace
